message:
fix: "Add more..." navigates to dashboard with Studio open + SSE skips 503 retries

- Sidebar: when not on a dashboard page, navigate to /?customizeSidebar=true
  instead of opening the old SidebarCustomizer
- SSE: skip retries on 503 (service unavailable in demo mode) same as 401

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
